title: lachenalia mediana subsp. mediana
intro: Lachenalia mediana subsp. mediana, also known as the yellow or orange lantern flower, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asparagaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Lachenalia mediana subsp. mediana include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in the form of a tincture or infusion, and it can also be applied topically as a poultice to aid in wound healing.
